title: DAY 03 — CRM-M3 — ORDER CONFIRMATION & FIMS PROCESSING

questions.question: Which of the following correctly describes the opening of a COD call using Script 1A?

options.text: Confirm the order details first, then introduce yourself as Team Sylvi
Introduce yourself as calling from Sylvi, state the product ordered, then confirm you are speaking with the customer
Ask the customer for their delivery address before stating the reason for the call
Send a WhatsApp template before calling to ensure the customer is available

questions.question: After a COD customer verbally confirms their order during Script 1B, what is the immediate next step?

options.text: Select 'Confirmation Call (Confirmed)' in FIMS and move the order to To Pack
Initiate WhatsApp Flow to get written confirmation as a backup
Run Script 1C — Address Verification before taking any FIMS action
Ask the customer if they have any product questions before closing

questions.question: What are the three conditions that must ALL be met for an address to be considered valid during Script 1C?

options.text: Customer verbally confirms address + pincode matches Shopify record + phone number is correct
Address is traceable on Google Maps + a landmark is available + pincode is correct and serviceable
Address has a house number + a street name + a recognisable city name
Address confirmed on call + WhatsApp confirmation received + FIMS remark added

questions.question: A COD customer says: 'I need to check with my family first — can you call back later?' Which script handles this correctly?

options.text: Script 1E — Customer Cancels on Call
Script 2A — 2nd Call Attempt (No Response)
Script 1D — Customer Not Sure / Wants to Think
Template 3C — Final Reminder (WhatsApp)

questions.question: During Script 1C, the address provided has no landmark and the area name is unclear. What is the correct action?

options.text: Select 'Confirmation Call (Confirmed)' and note the address concern in the remark — the customer confirmed, so process the order
Cancel the order — an unverifiable address means the order cannot proceed
Ask the customer for a proper landmark and correct pincode; select 'Call Attempted'; do not move the order to To Pack until all three conditions are met
Select 'Auto Confirmed' and flag the address issue for the courier partner to resolve on delivery

questions.question: A CRM Executive calls a COD customer for the second time and gets no answer again. What is the correct action sequence?

options.text: Cancel the order — two unanswered calls constitute unconfirmed delivery intent
Select 'Call Attempted' → add remark '2nd call attempt — no response' → Initiate WhatsApp Flow
Wait 24 hours and then make the third call without taking any FIMS action yet
Escalate to CRM Asst Manager for authorisation to cancel

questions.question: A COD customer replies 'YES' to Template 3A, but the delivery address on file has no pincode. What is the correct action?

options.text: Auto Confirmed → To Pack — the customer has confirmed intent via WhatsApp
Cancellation Request — an address with a missing pincode cannot be processed
Send Template 3B to collect the complete address before confirming
Call the customer to confirm verbally since WhatsApp confirmation alone is insufficient when the address is incomplete

questions.question: What is the maximum number of call attempts permitted before marking the order 'Call Attempted' and moving to the WhatsApp Flow?
After the 3rd and final call attempt with no response, what are the two mandatory actions?

options.text: Cancel the order immediately — three unanswered calls means the customer has declined
Select 'Auto Confirmed' → send Template 3A as a courtesy notification only
Select 'Call Attempted' → add remark '3rd and final call attempt — no response, WhatsApp message sent' → do NOT make a 4th call
Escalate to CRM Asst Manager before taking any action — all 3-attempt cases require manager sign-off

questions.question: A customer places a COD order for a Certified Imperfect watch. What is the mandatory step before confirming the order?

options.text: No special steps — Certified Imperfect orders are confirmed using the standard Script 1B flow
Transfer the call to the CRM Asst Manager, who handles all CI confirmations
Run Script 4A to inform the customer of the CI/Prototype policy before proceeding with confirmation
Send Template 3A via WhatsApp instead of calling — CI orders require written confirmation only

questions.question: During Script 4A, the Prototype order customer says: 'No, I don't want to continue with this.' What is the correct action?

options.text: Attempt retention — the customer may change their mind if the Prototype benefits are explained further
Escalate to CRM Asst Manager — Prototype cancellations require manager approval
Cancel the order and add remark: 'Customer informed of Prototype/Certified Imperfect policy — cancelled'
Mark 'Call Attempted' and resend the Prototype policy information via Template 3A

questions.question: A COD customer confirmed their order on call and the address passed all three verification conditions. What is the correct remark?

options.text: 'COD order confirmed — address OK'
'Call confirmed + address verified – order to pack'
'Confirmation call done — moving to To Pack'
'Customer confirmed on call – address verified'

questions.question: The CRM Executive ran Script 1D — the customer was undecided and asked to be called back. What is the correct remark?

options.text: 'Customer not answering — follow-up required'
'Call attempted — customer unavailable'
'Customer undecided — order held, follow-up required'
'No confirmation received — order on hold'

questions.question: A Prototype order customer was informed via Script 4A and confirmed they want to proceed. What remark must be added?

options.text: 'Prototype policy acknowledged — order confirmed'
'Special order — customer confirmed after policy briefing'
'CI policy explained — customer OK with imperfections'
'Customer informed of Prototype/Certified Imperfect policy — confirmed'

questions.question: For which order type is a confirmation call NOT mandatory, but address verification IS mandatory?

options.text: COD orders where the customer has previously ordered from Sylvi and confirmed by WhatsApp
Prepaid orders
Prototype and Certified Imperfect orders regardless of payment method
Orders where the customer called Sylvi themselves to place the order

questions.question: A CRM Executive is about to call a COD customer but notices the order already has a 'Call Attempted' remark from earlier the same day. What should the Executive do?

options.text: Call the customer again as a fresh attempt — the earlier remark was by a different team member and does not count toward the limit
Check Order History to understand the full picture, then determine the next step while ensuring total call attempts do not exceed 3
Skip calling — since another team member already attempted, no further call action is allowed today
Mark the order 'Auto Confirmed' — a prior call attempt demonstrates delivery intent on the team's part
